name: SC Music Corporate Host

securitySheaf.label: Probe IC
securitySheaf.effect: A smiling promo avatar checks badges and backstage permissions.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: Stage managers start tracking where the icon came from.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble IC
securitySheaf.effect: Media assets, schedules, and contract trails begin remixing themselves.

securitySheaf.label: Tar Baby IC
securitySheaf.effect: Handler icons try to keep the intruder trapped in approval loops.

securitySheaf.label: Blaster IC
securitySheaf.effect: Backstage security turns the spotlight hostile.

sculpting: Glossy dream-factory of studio lot, executive lounge, digital stage set, green-room mirrors, gold record walls, master tapes, and velvet-lined vaults.
notes: Corporate media host tied to artist management, promotions, distribution, branding assets, contracts, and behavior-shaping market analysis.

nodes.title: Marquee Login
nodes.description: A glowing marquee spells out SC Music in perfect gold. Backstage doors wait behind credential velvet ropes.

nodes.title: Green-Room Lobby
nodes.description: Mirrors, gold records, and scheduling boards flatter every authorized icon before quietly sorting them by usefulness.

choices.label: Review artist schedules and promo plans

nodes.title: Gold Record Promo Wall
nodes.description: Release calendars, tour-support logistics, approved image kits, and audience segmentation charts glitter under friendly lights.

choices.label: Search for sponsorship webs or audience manipulation

nodes.title: Market Analysis Mirror
nodes.description: Audience segments, promo triggers, and behavior-shaping campaign notes reflect the intruder back as a target demographic.

nodes.title: Velvet-Lined Vault Door
nodes.description: Contracts, royalty structures, executive mail, unreleased assets, and talent-handling strategy sit behind a glamorous lock.

choices.label: Evade backstage trace and return to lobby

nodes.title: Contract and Masters Vault
nodes.description: Master tapes, crystal reels, locked trunks, and executive mail folders reveal who gets made, broken, sponsored, or buried.

choices.label: Alter release plans, royalties, or executive mail

nodes.title: Release Edit Suite
nodes.description: A glossy editing bay allows changes to release plans, royalties, and communications. Every control is also a trap for bad signatures.

choices.label: Commit the alteration and cache proof
Slip out through approved promo traffic

nodes.title: Stage Control Rig
nodes.description: Production systems, media controls, and studio-linked slave hooks hang above the stage like lighting instruments.

choices.label: Drop back before the spotlight locks on

nodes.title: Unreleased Track Cache
nodes.description: You have material the table can use: contract leverage, sponsorship trails, influence machinery, rivalries, or media assets.

choices.label: Stay for one deeper vault pass

nodes.title: Backstage Exit
nodes.description: The lights dim, the green-room mirror forgets your face, and SC Music's dream factory closes behind you.
